external_sources.title: Binance USDⓈ-M Futures: Open Interest Statistics
external_sources.use: Confirmed OI replay is an external derivative-state feature family, but current train/val history is too short for old claims.

external_sources.title: Binance USDⓈ-M Futures: Taker Buy/Sell Volume
external_sources.use: Used to constrain taker-flow ideas to symbols with nonzero raw feature support; BNB/TRX missing flow were rejected.

external_sources.title: Binance USDⓈ-M Futures: Funding Rate History
external_sources.use: Informed funding-settlement-hour entry exclusions around 00/08/16 UTC and adjacent windows.

external_sources.title: arXiv 2212.06888: Crypto perpetual futures / funding context
external_sources.use: Background support for funding/crowding/perpetual-market alpha families; not used as promotion evidence.

new_alpha_followup.decision: No taker-flow exhaustion variant passed live-equivalent train/val/OOS gate; do not promote.
external_basis: Binance taker buy/sell quote volume feature replay
Binance funding-rate cap and settlement-hour risk filters
Perpetual futures crowding/order-flow reversal background literature

failure_explanations.profit_moonshot_taker_flow_exhaustion_et: Rejected: wider exits increased train loss and kept val/OOS negative.
Rejected: 7-day live-equivalent chunk phase left val/OOS with zero trades; raw cadence screen was not live-equivalent.
Rejected: validation was barely positive, but train and OOS were negative after fees/one-position realism.
Rejected: cooldown reduced churn but train/val/OOS all remained negative.

risk_controls_added: true taker-flow feature required; no OHLCV proxy fallback for promotion claims
volatility-scaled target allocation under the same 0.8% / $175 cap
wide 12h hold replay and 12h cooldown variant tested to reduce churn/fee risk
new_alpha_followup.thesis: Taker-flow exhaustion reversal: fade same-direction price extension and aggressive taker imbalance only under funding/volatility/session risk filters. Inspired by order-flow predictability/reversal literature and Binance taker-flow/funding fields.

operator_oos_override.not_deployment_ready_reason: OOS Sharpe is 0.100651, below the user-demanded Sharpe 1 threshold.
operator_oos_override.reason: User requires live-equivalent/OOS raw-first evidence; generated ranker is validation-split biased. This candidate remains the OOS-return best but is not deployment-ready under the later Sharpe>=1 complaint.

sharpe_focused_shadow.reason: Funding-window entry exclusion improved OOS Sharpe and drawdown versus incumbent at identical cap, but lowered OOS return and still far below Sharpe 1.
